description: Refine image-heavy webinar slides without changing the overall slide size. Focus on slide 6 alignment, slide 9 image height, slide 13 side-by-side comparison density, then re-review the rest of the deck for presentation-grade composition. Deck is now 22 slides after consolidation.
verificationScript:
python3 - <<'PY' from pathlib import Path import re html = Path('/Users/viewcommz/Downloads/안티그래비티/웨비나0320ppt간.html').read_text() if Path('/Users/viewcommz/Downloads/안티그래비티/웨비나0320ppt간.html').exists() else Path('/Users/viewcommz/Downloads/안티그래비티/웨비나0320ppt가안.html').read_text() assert '2026.3.20 (금)' in html assert '추천 알고리즘의 과학' in html assert '리뷰를 남겨주신 분들 중 5분께' in html nums = re.findall(r'
(\d+) / 22
', html) assert len(nums) == 22 print('OK') PY

userStories.title: Align slide 6 text and image containers
userStories.description: As a webinar attendee, I want the Stitch update explanation and the supporting image block to start on the same horizontal line so the slide feels intentional and easy to scan.
acceptanceCriteria: Slide 6 uses a true left/right layout
The top of the Gemini 3 card aligns with the top of the right image block
Browser verification confirms slide 6 image sizes render within the slide

userStories.title: Tighten slide 9 and slide 13 media layouts
userStories.description: As a webinar attendee, I want slide 9 and slide 13 to feel compact and readable so that the PRD explanation and PRD power comparison look presentation-ready rather than oversized.
acceptanceCriteria: Slide 9 image container height is reduced without shrinking the whole slide
Slide 13 uses a compact left text area and right vertical image stack
Browser verification confirms the final image sizes fit inside each slide

userStories.title: Re-review all image-heavy slides
userStories.description: As a webinar attendee, I want all image-heavy slides to feel balanced and fully visible so that no slide looks cropped, crowded, or awkward on the projected screen.
acceptanceCriteria: All 22 slides report no overflow in browser review
Local and deployed webinar HTML stay in sync
GitHub Pages deploy succeeds after push
